overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a densely populated Night City commercial district. The character navigates through outdoor food markets, enters a retro-style diner, and continues through neon-lit alleyways and plazas with futuristic architecture and heavy pedestrian activity.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a crowded night market with food stalls and neon signs overhead

traditional red paper lanterns hanging from stall awning
large red neon dragon sign on building facade
concrete seating structure with people resting
food vendor stall with blue counter and green neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered night market with yellow canopies overhead. Red paper lanterns and neon signs illuminate the scene as the character walks through moderate crowds. Food stalls line both sides with steam rising from cooking equipment, and a large red neon dragon sign is visible in the distance.

red neon sign reading 'Urmland' above the entrance
white horizontal metal slat shutters on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a building entrance with concrete stairs leading upward. A red neon 'Urmland' sign marks the doorway as the character ascends past a descending NPC. The environment transitions from the open market to a more enclosed entranceway with metal shutters and glowing red floor lights.

segments.scene_description: Inside the Urmland diner, the character walks across distinctive black-and-white checkered flooring. Red vinyl booths line the left wall where patrons sit eating, while a service counter runs along the right. Warm artificial lighting from ceiling fixtures and a large curved overhead light illuminates the retro interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban street with vending machines and shop fronts

events.description: exiting the diner back into the brightly lit neon street
emerging from covered area into open street with bright pink neon signs visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past vending machines and towering neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the diner, the scene opens into a brightly lit urban street with towering glass buildings and neon advertisements. A blue vending machine stands on the left near a metal fence, while pink neon signs glow overhead. The character walks along the sidewalk past various shop fronts and outdoor seating areas.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered market walkway beneath a metal roof. A bright green neon 'CHILL' sign hangs on the left, while food stalls with white curtains and metal shelving line the path. The narrow passage is moderately crowded with pedestrians moving in opposing directions.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide plaza with red outdoor tables where people sit eating. A massive pink neon motorcycle sign dominates the view overhead, while towering glass skyscrapers rise in the background. Food stalls with yellow canopies and steam vents line the area as the character moves through the open space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling outdoor night market into a retro diner and back out into a towering neon cityscape. It begins under yellow canopies and red paper lanterns, moving through crowds and rising steam toward a distant red neon dragon. As the camera approaches a building entrance, the open market gives way to concrete stairs and glowing red floor lights beneath a neon Urmland sign. The scene then shifts indoors to the Urmland diner, gliding across black-and-white checkered floors past red vinyl booths and a service counter under warm artificial lighting. Finally, the camera exits the establishment and opens onto a brightly lit urban street, passing a blue vending machine and pink neon signs beneath the shadow of towering glass skyscrapers.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined, covered market walkway into a vast, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins by navigating a narrow passage beneath a metal roof, passing a bright green neon sign and food stalls draped in white curtains amidst a flow of pedestrians. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens up into a wide public square filled with red outdoor tables and diners. The scene then expands to reveal a massive pink neon motorcycle sign overhead and towering glass skyscrapers that dominate the skyline. Finally, the camera glides through the open area past yellow-canopied food stalls emitting plumes of steam.
